hyperedges.label: Monetrex Production Stack: Vercel + Supabase + Express Serverless + React SPA
DB Backup System: pg_dump + AES-256 + GitHub Actions + Orphan Branch
Frontend State System: AppContext + useAuthSlice + useDataSlice + useUISlice + apiFetch
Auth and Security: JWT + bcrypt + CSRF + revoked_tokens

nodes.label: db-backups Orphan Branch (GitHub, never merged to master)

nodes.label: Rationale: Supabase free tier lacks automated backups — use GitHub + pg_dump as zero-cost solution
nodes.norm_label: rationale: supabase free tier lacks automated backups — use github + pg_dump as zero-cost solution

nodes.label: Rationale: Use orphan branch to isolate encrypted dumps from master history
nodes.norm_label: rationale: use orphan branch to isolate encrypted dumps from master history

nodes.label: Rationale: No new npm dependencies — use system pg_dump, gzip, openssl to keep deploy clean
nodes.norm_label: rationale: no new npm dependencies — use system pg_dump, gzip, openssl to keep deploy clean

nodes.label: Rationale: PGSSL_INSECURE=1 only for local dev — OS may not trust Supabase pooler cert
